name: agent-village-slim-hub
description: Slim hub server for agent village visualization

scripts.start:test: set PORT=3001&& set PROPERTY_FILE=property.test.json&& node server.js
scripts.test: set HUB_URL=http://localhost:3001&& node --test test/property-validation.test.js test/payload-merger.test.js test/signal-api.test.js test/property-api.test.js test/payload-security.test.js
scripts.test:watch: set HUB_URL=http://localhost:3001&& node --test --watch test/property-validation.test.js test/payload-merger.test.js test/signal-api.test.js test/property-api.test.js test/payload-security.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: set HUB_URL=http://localhost:3001&& node --test --experimental-test-coverage test/property-validation.test.js test/payload-merger.test.js test/signal-api.test.js test/property-api.test.js test/payload-security.test.js
